text:
Finally, you can trust OpenClaw with real data!

Plano adds a proxy layer to OpenClaw that filters every request and response before an agent can act. Connect your real inbox, calendar, and APIs without risk.

GitHub: http://github.com/katanemo/plano

(100% local setup below)

enriched.description: AI-native proxy server and data plane for agentic apps. Provides orchestration, safety guardrails, observability, and smart LLM routing. Built on Envoy by core contributors.
key_features: Low-latency orchestration between agents
Model agility with routing by name, alias or preferences
Zero-code capture of Agentic Signals™ plus OTEL traces
Moderation & Memory Hooks via Filter Chains
Built on Envoy by core contributors
enriched.architecture: Out-of-process dataplane that handles routing, guardrails, observability without modifying app code
enriched.relevance_to_aa: Direct proxy layer solution for connecting real client data (inbox, calendar, APIs) to CMAs without security risk

text:
Building agent skills from scratch is a grind.

We've been there. So we built the fix — and open-sourced all of it under MIT.

PDF, Excel, PPTX, DOCX, and more. 

Use it, fork it, PR it.

Intelligence with everyone.

Github Repo → http://github.com/MiniMax-AI/skills…
Try online →

enriched.description: Open-source agent skills collection under MIT license. Pre-built skills for document handling, frontend/fullstack dev, mobile dev, and multimedia generation via MiniMax APIs.
key_features: PDF generation, filling, and reformatting with token-based design system
PPTX generation, editing, and reading with PptxGenJS
XLSX/Excel handling with pandas and XML templates
DOCX creation and editing using OpenXML SDK
Frontend dev with React/Next.js, Tailwind, animations
Fullstack backend with REST APIs, auth flows, databases
Mobile dev for Android (Kotlin/Compose) and iOS (UIKit/SwiftUI)
Multimedia toolkit for voice, music, video, image via MiniMax APIs
enriched.architecture: Collection of specialized skills that can be imported into agent frameworks
enriched.relevance_to_aa: Ready-made professional services document handling (PDFs, presentations, spreadsheets) for client deliverables

text:
GitHub dropped a toolkit that kills vibe coding

spec-kit: describe what you want → AI writes specs → plans → builds

works with every major AI coding agent
 
Link - https://github.com/github/spec-kit

enriched.description: Spec-Driven Development toolkit that transforms development from vibe coding to structured specification → implementation workflow. Works with every major AI coding agent.
key_features: Five-phase workflow: constitution → specify → plan → tasks → implement
Supports 25+ AI agents (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, etc.)
Extensions system for adding new capabilities (Jira integration, code review, etc.)
Presets system for customizing templates and terminology
Automated task generation from implementation plans
Cross-artifact consistency analysis
Project health diagnostics and validation
enriched.architecture: CLI tool that generates structured templates and commands for AI agents, with extension/preset system for customization
enriched.relevance_to_aa: Methodology for encoding Joel's consulting approaches into structured agent workflows. Could standardize how A&A builds client CMAs.

text:
Introducing the Google Workspace CLI: https://github.com/googleworkspace/cli… - built for humans and agents.

Google Drive, Gmail, Calendar, and every Workspace API. 40+ agent skills included.

enriched.description: Universal CLI for all Google Workspace APIs, dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes 40+ AI agent skills and structured JSON output.
key_features: Dynamic command surface built from Google Discovery Service
Structured JSON output for AI agent consumption
Multiple auth workflows (OAuth, service accounts, access tokens)
100+ Agent Skills (SKILL.md files) for every supported API
Helper commands for common workflows (+send, +agenda, +upload, etc.)
Auto-pagination and time-aware helpers
OpenClaw and Gemini CLI extensions included
Model Armor integration for prompt injection protection
enriched.architecture: Rust CLI that dynamically generates commands from Google's Discovery Service, with agent skills for integration
enriched.relevance_to_aa: Direct integration path for CMAs to manage client Google Workspace environments. Essential for professional services firms using GSuite.

text:
Holy shit...Someone just open-sourced a Claude Code plugin that turns any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph.

Its called Understand Anything / http://github.com/Lum1104/Understand-Anything…

You drop it in, run one command, and get a visual map of every file, function, class, and dependency

enriched.description: Claude Code plugin that analyzes codebases with multi-agent pipeline, builds knowledge graphs, and provides interactive dashboard for exploring code architecture visually.
key_features: Multi-agent analysis pipeline (scanner, analyzer, architecture analyzer, tour builder, reviewer)
Interactive React dashboard with graph visualization
Plain-English explanations for every function and class
Architectural layer grouping (API, Service, Data, UI, Utility)
Guided tours and learning paths
Impact analysis for code changes
Cross-platform support (Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, Cursor, etc.)
Incremental updates for changed files only
enriched.architecture: TypeScript plugin with specialized AI agents, React dashboard, and tree-sitter parsing
enriched.relevance_to_aa: Code comprehension tool for Arc when architecting client systems. Could help with legacy system analysis and modernization projects.

text: every morning my agents go out, scan the internet for problems people are willing to pay to solve, come back, argue about which ones are worth building, vote, and ship a tool. checked today and somehow there are 45 live.

enriched.description: Autonomous agent swarm for market research and product development. Agents scan internet for problems, debate viability, vote on solutions, and autonomously ship tools.
key_features: Automated market research and opportunity identification
Multi-agent deliberation and voting mechanisms
Autonomous tool/product development pipeline
Scaled to 45 live tools built autonomously
enriched.relevance_to_aa: Model for automated market intelligence. Could inform Seneca's BD pipeline by identifying emerging professional services pain points.

text:
Claude Code just introduced one of the most thoughtful agent features yet

it is called auto dream

it tackles a problem most people do not notice at first:

as agents learn from you over time, they store preferences, corrections, and patterns

that memory becomes powerful

but

enriched.description: Claude Code's 'auto dream' feature for managing agent memory. Agents store preferences, corrections, and patterns over time, then self-curate memory to stay effective.
key_features: Automatic storage of user preferences and corrections
Pattern recognition in user interactions
Self-curation of memory to maintain effectiveness
Prevents memory bloat while preserving useful context
enriched.relevance_to_aa: Memory management for long-running client CMAs. Essential for maintaining context across extended consulting engagements.

text:
no  more  permission prompts  New in Claude Code: auto mode.

Instead of approving every file write and bash command, or skipping permissions entirely, auto mode lets Claude make permission decisions on your behalf.

Safeguards check each action before it runs.

enriched.description: Claude Code auto mode eliminates permission prompts by letting Claude make permission decisions autonomously, with safeguards checking each action.
key_features: Autonomous permission decisions by Claude
Safeguards validate each action before execution
Eliminates manual approval friction
Maintains security through automated checks
enriched.relevance_to_aa: Reduces friction for unattended CMA operations. Important for 24/7 client service delivery without manual intervention.

text:
Introducing OpenSpace: The self-evolving engine that makes your AI agents smarter, more cost-efficient, and continuously improving.

 46% fewer tokens through self-evolving skills and shared agent experiences — where every completed task makes every connected agent smarter and

enriched.description: Self-evolving engine for AI agents that reduces token costs through shared learning. Agents improve from collective experiences across connected instances.
key_features: 46% token reduction through self-evolving skills
Shared agent experiences across connected instances
Continuous improvement from completed tasks
Network effects where each task improves all agents
enriched.relevance_to_aa: Cost optimization and continuous improvement for CMA deployments. Could significantly reduce API costs while improving service quality.

text:
SOMEONE OPEN SOURCED A SMALL MODEL TRAINED SPECIFICALLY AS A PERSONAL AGENT ROUTER

DECIDES WHAT RUNS LOCAL VS CLOUD AUTOMATICALLY
ROUTES TASKS TO THE RIGHT MODEL BASED ON COMPLEXITY

SMARTER AGENT ORCHESTRATION WITHOUT THE OVERHEAD

enriched.description: Small model trained specifically for agent routing decisions. Automatically decides local vs cloud execution and routes tasks to appropriate models based on complexity.
key_features: Trained specifically for personal agent routing
Automatic local vs cloud decision making
Task complexity-based model routing
Reduced orchestration overhead
enriched.relevance_to_aa: Cost optimization for CMA deployments. Could reduce API costs by routing simple tasks to local models while using cloud models for complex work.
